description.value: Dragonkin have the ability to form permanent bonds with a chosen partner. Some ryphorians, through countless years of close proximity to the draconic inhabitants of Triaxus, have learned to emulate this ability to a limited degree. You can form a temporary bond with one willing sapient creature as a 10-minute activity that can only be attempted if you and your partner share a deep bond. Once formed, this bond lasts for 1 day. When you're within 30 feet of this bonded creature, you both gain a +1 circumstance bonus to Will saves.
